mapper.sql: id, access_terminal, append_index, archived_at, belong_date, call_logs, create_time, creator_id, creator_name, enterprise_id, final_content, final_message_struct, infer_log, is_complete, message_content, message_id, message_ref, message_struct, metadata, msg_status, project_id, rel_message_id, rel_objs, related_resources, res_com_id, res_com_ids, "role", session_id, task_id, update_time, "usage", doc_access_terminal, doc_belong_date, doc_create_time, doc_creator_id, doc_infer_log, doc_is_complete, doc_message_content, doc_message_id, doc_message_struct, doc_metadata, doc_msg_status, doc_project_id, doc_related_resources, doc_res_com_ids, doc_session_id, doc_task_id, doc_usage
mapper.select: SELECT FROM byai_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM byai_message WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM byai_message WHERE message_id = #{messageId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO byai_message ( id, session_id, task_id, access_terminal, metadata, "role", "usage", creator_id, message_id, message_struct, create_time, belong_date, message_content, related_resources, call_logs, infer_log, msg_status, project_id, res_com_ids, is_complete, archived_at, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.sessionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.accessTerminal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.metadata,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.role,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.usage,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.creatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.messageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.messageStruct,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.belongDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.messageContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.relatedResources,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.callLogs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.inferLog,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.msgStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.projectId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.resComIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.isComplete,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{item.archivedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE byai_message
metadata = #{item.metadata}, "role" = #{item.role}, "usage" = #{item.usage}, creator_id = #{item.creatorId}, session_id = #{item.sessionId}, task_id = #{item.taskId}, message_struct = #{item.messageStruct},
create_time = to_timestamp(CAST(#{item.createTimeMillis} AS BIGINT) / 1000.0), belong_date = (to_timestamp(CAST(#{item.belongDateMillis} AS BIGINT) / 1000.0))::date, message_content = #{item.messageContent}, related_resources = #{item.relatedResources}, call_logs = #{item.callLogs}, infer_log = #{item.inferLog}, msg_status = #{item.msgStatus}, project_id = #{item.projectId}, access_terminal = #{item.accessTerminal}, res_com_ids = #{item.resComIds}, archived_at = #{item.archivedAt}, update_time = #{item.updateTime},
WHERE message_id = #{item.messageId}
